title: Dig to Nether
description: Enter The Nether by digging deep enough!
body:
Ever wondered why we can't just dig down to The Nether? Well now you can!

Dig to Nether allows you to enter The Nether by entering the bottom of the world, and exiting by building up to The Nether roof! You can replace bedrock with the block you specify in the plugins config file, either by running /replacebedrockinchunk or having the plugin automatically handle it for you ([See here](https://github.com/64Terabytes/DigToNetherPlugin/wiki/Replacing-Bedrock))

[Video demo](https://youtu.be/JJ6UspZvHuE)


Issues, suggestions, need help? Try reading the [wiki](https://github.com/64Terabytes/DigToNetherPlugin/wiki), or let me know by adding your comment to the [discussion tab on spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/threads/dig-to-nether.605708/), or by [raising an issue on Github](https://github.com/64Terabytes/DigToNetherPlugin/issues).

If you make a review video on this plugin, feel free to let me know and I might feature you here.

Happy digging!
